config_notes: target_geography is intentionally empty — Proliv Rx is cash-pay nationwide, no state mandate logic applies. The cashpay_psychiatry profile is the primary, high-volume ICP. The corrections profile is secondary and uses government/public-record sourcing rather than practice-website scraping; do not run it through the standard practice-site extraction path without adapting the source layer. bullseye_min_score is 90 to match the engine default. academic_medical_center and hospital affiliation are treated as exclusion/friction because of institutional buying complexity, consistent with the master Bullseye doctrine that hospital systems are a weak fit.
